title: thelypteris alpina
intro: Thelypteris alpina, also known as the Alpine Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris alpina include its ability to soothe coughs, calm digestive issues, and alleviate stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
